name: Ola Electric
executive_summary: Ola Electric, an Indian EV manufacturer, is facing challenges in supplier relationships, sales-registration mismatches, and transitioning to electric vehicles. XYZ Analytics Consulting offers Dealer BI to streamline dealership performance, address underperformance, and boost sales conversion rates. By leveraging real-time dealer data, Ola Electric can enhance its market position and increase extended warranty sales.
business_challenges: Supplier disputes affecting production efficiency
Sales-registration mismatches leading to revenue discrepancies
Challenges in transitioning effectively to electric vehicles

solution_mapping.challenge: Supplier disputes affecting production efficiency
solution_mapping.xyz_capability: Supply-Chain Risk Prediction to monitor supply disruptions (Handbook p.4)

solution_mapping.challenge: Sales-registration mismatches leading to revenue discrepancies
solution_mapping.xyz_capability: Consolidated dealer performance dashboard across the entire network (Handbook p.11)
solution_mapping.kpi_impact: Sales per Dealer, Showroom Conversion Rate

solution_mapping.challenge: Challenges in transitioning effectively to electric vehicles
solution_mapping.xyz_capability: Identification of underperforming dealers by sales, service, and aftermarket metrics (Handbook p.11)

expected_business_value: Networks that adopt structured dealer analytics report a 15% increase in extended-warranty sales and a KPI achievement rate improvement of 10–20%.
why_winnable: Ola Electric's ambition to be a quality EV hub aligns with XYZ's proven track record of boosting dealership performance.

name: Sona BLW Precis.
executive_summary: Sona BLW Precis. is a leading automotive component manufacturer facing challenges in transitioning to electric vehicles and managing supply chain disruptions. By leveraging XYZ's Supply-Risk AI, they can anticipate and mitigate these disruptions, ensuring business continuity. This will enable Sona BLW Precis. to sustain their impressive revenue growth and enhance their market position.
business_challenges: Supply chain issues affecting component availability and production continuity.
Challenges in transitioning to electric vehicle component manufacturing, especially in a global and competitive market.

solution_mapping.challenge: Supply chain issues affecting component availability and production continuity.
solution_mapping.xyz_capability: Real-time risk scoring for suppliers, components, and logistics routes.

solution_mapping.challenge: Challenges in transitioning to electric vehicle component manufacturing.
solution_mapping.xyz_capability: Disruption simulation — modelling the production impact of a supplier failure or material shortage.

expected_business_value: AI-driven supply-chain management can cut logistics costs by up to 15% and reduce excess inventory by approximately 35%, as per Handbook p.9.
why_winnable: Given Sona BLW Precis.'s proactive investment in EV technology and its current supply chain challenges, XYZ's targeted solutions can offer immediate and measurable improvements.
